title: pelargonium × atrovirens
intro: Pelargonium × atrovirens is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, known for its distinctive dark green leaves and red flowers. The plant is also referred to as the 'Red Form' or 'Dark Leaf Geranium', which is a variation of the more commonly known Pelargonium species. The leaves and flowers of Pelargonium × atrovirens have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, helping to soothe digestive issues, relieve stress, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
